---
title: "Copilot Studio Day Course"
subtitle: "Reusable training materials, guided labs, and MCP starter projects"
---

::: {.hero-panel}
<span class="kicker">One-day format</span>

This repository packages the material for a one-day Copilot Studio course with two distinct modes:

- a practical morning for all attendees
- a deeper afternoon for super users who want to build and deploy MCP servers

The public repo stays anonymous. The examples are framed around a Swedish municipal utility scenario without naming the client.
:::

## What This Repository Will Hold

:::: {.course-grid}
::: {.course-card}
### Morning enablement

Guided steps for signing in, building a first agent, grounding with files and websites, reviewing existing MCP connections, and publishing to channels.
:::

::: {.course-card}
### Afternoon build track

A code-first walkthrough using `uv`, Python, `FastMCP`, inspector tooling, and Azure Container Apps deployment.
:::

::: {.course-card}
### Reusable class assets

Copy-paste instructions, public datasets, template MCP servers, and future video scripts that attendees can revisit after class.
:::
::::

## Course Flow

1. Morning fundamentals in Copilot Studio
2. Lunch break and environment setup
3. Afternoon coding and deployment walkthrough
4. Closing brainstorming session for attendee scenarios

## Jump In

- Start with [Course Overview](course-overview.qmd)
- Open the [Morning Track](morning/index.qmd)
- Open the [Afternoon Track](afternoon/index.qmd)
- Use [Copy and Paste](instructions/index.qmd) for ready-made snippets
- Present from [Morning Slides](slides/morning.qmd) or [Afternoon Slides](slides/afternoon.qmd)
